identity.title: Push It On Me
identity.styleSentence: A moody French touch deep house track at 123 BPM featuring a filtered disco loop and warm analog bassline that drives an intimate late-night vibe, underscored by side-chained pads and glitched female vocal chops.
identity.vocalStyle: sultry female vocals with chopped/glitched hooks

lyrics.text:
[Intro - filtered, distant vocal]
feel it... feel it... (feel-feel-feel it)

[Verse]
low lights, slow move, bodies in the dark
nobody's watchin', give in to the spark

[Hook - chopped & repeated]
push it on me (push-push-push it on me)
keep the feeling, keep the feeling on
(on-on-on)

[Drop - vocal stutter over bass]
feel-feel-feel... it on
feel-feel-feel... it on

[Breakdown - whispered]
don't stop now... keep it slow

[Hook]
push it on me (push-push-push it on me)
lyrics.lrc:
[Intro]
[00:00.00] Hmm
[00:05.00] Feel it, feel it
[Verse 1]
[00:30.62] Low light, slow move, bodies in the dark
[00:34.38] No, nobody's watching, giving through the spark
[Chorus]
[00:38.18] Push it on me, push, push, push it on me
[00:41.18] Keep the feeling, keep the feeling on
[Drop]
[00:48.88] Feel it on
[00:52.76] Feel it on
[Bridge]
[00:55.94] Stop now, keep it slow
[01:23.69] Don't stop now, keep it slow
[01:32.66] Push it, push it, push it on
[01:40.12] Push it on
[Hook]
[02:18.52] Feel it,
[02:19.00] feel it
[02:35.58] Don't stop now, keep it slow

analysis.summary: This deep house track captures a seductive, late-night atmosphere where intimacy and desire take center stage in a smoky club setting.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A dimly lit room with deep shadows pooling on the floor, barely visible dust motes dancing in a single beam of amber light.
Slow motion footage of smoke rings rising lazily from an incense burner against a velvet curtain background.
A close-up perspective looking up at lips parted in anticipation, with warm skin tones glowing softly under low light.
Silky fabric brushing against bare skin in a haze of golden hour lighting that feels almost liquid to the touch.
A frozen moment where time seems suspended, capturing the exact second before movement resumes in a smoky haze.
Tiny blue-white embers glowing within a dark fireplace, illuminating two faces inches apart in total darkness.
